title: Cardiochlaena macrophylla
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Cardiochlaena macrophylla.
taxonomy: Cardiochlaena macrophylla is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This classification suggests that it belongs to the genus Cardiochlaena. The genus Cardiochlaena is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. Cardiochlaena macrophylla is native to South Africa, and its classification as a member of the Dryopteridaceae family places it within the larger group of wood ferns. Further classification includes its placement within the phylum Pteridophyta, or the division of ferns.
